name: Zendesk
description: Customer service platform providing ticketing, user and organization management, messaging, and related support APIs.

auth_methods.note: Official developer docs list OAuth 2.0, API token (used like an API key), and basic auth (email/password or email/token). Support article details API token usage and basic auth variant.

credential_access.note: Generating an API token requires an admin to create it in Admin Center; tokens are not obtainable by a developer without admin privileges. OAuth app creation and admin-level settings likewise require account/admin setup.

api_surface.note: The Ticketing API reference is a broad REST API covering tickets, users, organizations, ticket fields and many core product objects. Developer portal lists multiple APIs and SDKs, indicating wide coverage.

buildability.note: Technically well-documented and usable, but API credentials (API tokens) must be generated by an account administrator, preventing a third-party developer from self-serving credentials on an arbitrary Zendesk instance.

queries: Zendesk API authentication oauth2 api token basic
Zendesk generate API token admin center
Zendesk API rate limits vary by plan
